raw_consumer_statement: I reported criminal identity theft and fraudulent inducement involving the merchant XXXX and the stolen persona of public figure XXXX XXXX. Despite providing FBI ( XXXX Case # XXXX ) and FTC ( Report # XXXX ) documentation, American Express refused to open a fraud investigation. They are erroneously treating a criminal scheme as a 'merchant dispute ' and are demanding I contact a fraudulent entity, which is a safety risk and a violation of my rights under the Fair Credit Billing Act regarding self-concealing fraud and the Discovery Rule.
